CheckTitle: OBS buckets are not publicly accessible
Description: Ensure that OBS buckets are not publicly accessible to prevent unauthorized access to stored objects.
Risk: Publicly accessible OBS buckets allow anyone on the internet to list, read, or modify stored objects, potentially exposing sensitive data to unauthorized access.

Code.Other:
1. Log on to the Huawei Cloud console.
2. Navigate to Object Storage Service.
3. Select the bucket.
4. Click the Permissions tab.
5. Remove any public read or public read/write permissions.
6. Click Save.

Recommendation.Text: Remove public access permissions from OBS buckets and use IAM policies for controlled access.
